sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96065" key="sporai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπορ-αῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n96065.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σπόριμος</ref> </xr>:—<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σποραῖα, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen></foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">seeds</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:13:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
